scope: Public Study/blog and Work article code block and Mermaid rendering styles
changed: Replaced custom prose code gradient, shadow, label, and mac-dot chrome with GitHub-like light/dark code surfaces.
Added inline code, code block, Mermaid shell, and highlight.js token CSS variables for light and dark modes.
Updated MermaidRenderer to use theme base with explicit light/dark themeVariables.
Added theme class observation so Mermaid diagrams rerender after light/dark toggles.
Added Playwright and Vitest coverage for code and Mermaid readability.

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=exhaustive npx playwright test tests/dark-mode.spec.ts --project=chromium-authenticated --grep "DM-18" --workers=1
validations.result: failed before implementation as expected, passed after implementation with 2/2 tests

validations.command: BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 NGINX_HTTPS_PORT=3002 docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build frontend nginx
validations.result: passed; frontend next build and TypeScript completed

risks: Unusual Mermaid diagram syntaxes may need additional color variable tuning.
Future highlight.js token classes not currently mapped may need extra scoped overrides.
recommendation: Keep the change and ship with the focused tests.
